measurement: Dorothy: Serendipity firing-mode economy (pellet consolidation mechanic)
treasure: false (per sim config; not verifiable from video)

solo.evidence: Battle Records screen: slot 1 = Dorothy: Serendipity LV.400 (CP 93276); slots 2-5 all 'EMPTY SLOT / NO SIGNAL' with 0 damage/kills. All popups are hers; she self-bursts Burst III (no team Full Burst).

clock.method: top-right MM:SS countdown; fightClock t = 180 - countdown; anchor at several points (countdown drifts slow)
clock.note: offset (videoSec - fightClock) drifts from ~5s early to ~2s late. Firing starts ~v7 (t3). Fight ends ~v182.
clock.videoMeta: portrait 1206x2622 rot=90 -> ffmpeg auto-rotates to landscape 2622x1206, 60fps, 189.9s

colourConvention: white = normal non-core pellet; orange + crit-icon = crit (x1.5); red 'CORE HIT' text = core; orange 'CORE HIT' = core+crit. Green horizontal beam = near-range pierce/muzzle VFX (NOT a mode marker - see caveat). Excluded: large 6-7 digit 'CORE HIT PIERCE' single values that are likely burst-cast/skill riders (see consolidationValue caveat), boss red core-glow, 'OMG' kill banner, reticle ammo counter.

spray.signature: cluster of ~5-8 simultaneous popups per shot on the boss

pelletValueWhite.note: 31590 = 24300 x1.30, appears from ~t37 on; likely Skill-2 / accumulated attack buffs

coreValue.note: red 'CORE HIT' in spray ~1.77-2.0x the white pellet (core roughly doubles)

consolidation.trigger: Skill 1: after landing 80 cumulative pellets -> Pierce + Hit Rate +98.18% + Attack +72% + pellet count FIXED at 1, for '3 rounds'
consolidation.signature: a SINGLE large 'CORE HIT ... PIERCE' popup per shot (no white cluster); green pierce beam through boss

singleBulletCoreValue.nonBurstNote: clean read from the v31-37 episode (t28-34); ~110k = 24300 x ~4.5 (i.e. +72% attack x core-doubling x hit). This is the reliable consolidation-bullet value.
singleBulletCoreValue.largeValuesCaveat: AMBIGUOUS - 6-7 digit ~1.1-1.55M 'CORE HIT PIERCE' single values appear at t41,t52,t131,t139,t151,t175. Either burst-boosted consolidation cores OR her Burst-III cast / skill riders. Could not cleanly separate the two from a solo video. Do NOT treat as the plain single-bullet value.

coreRateInConsolidation.basis: every consolidation shot caught (7/7 frames: t31,t41,t52,t131,t139,t151,t175) rendered a 'CORE HIT'. The single 98.18%-hit + Pierce bullet aimed at boss centre cores essentially every shot -> far above the ~0.072 SG spray baseline and above the AR-class ~0.3-0.4 target.

burst.note: Burst III: +5 pellets (->15), attack speed +65%, ATK +88.12%, 15s. Could NOT cleanly count 15 pellets due to popup overlap; recorded per kit design. Burst also boosts the consolidation single-bullet enormously (the ~1.1-1.55M cores).

modeTimeline.method: 3s-spaced full-frame classification (spray=cluster / consolidation=single big CORE HIT / gap=reload), plus 4fps green-beam scan and a 3fps fine-walk of the t28-34 episode.
modeTimeline.keyStructuralFinding: Consolidation is RANGE-GATED. Its 80-landed-pellet trigger requires pellets to actually LAND, which only happens at NEAR range. When the boss is far/mid (t~65-120) she stays in 10-pellet spray and essentially never consolidates (verified spray at v75/90/105/118). Consolidation clusters in the near-range windows (t~10-65 and t~120-180, densest at late point-blank).
modeTimeline.firstConsolidationTrigger: ~t10-12 (video v14-16), ~7-9s after firing begins (80 pellets accumulated in ~10-11 near-range spray shots)
modeTimeline.episodeDuration: ~2-3.5s per consolidation episode (fine-walk t28->t34 ran ~3s of single-core pierce shots, then flipped back to spray)
modeTimeline.reTriggerCadence: roughly every ~10-20s within near windows (observed gaps t31->t52 =21s; t131->t139 =8s; t139->t151 =12s; t151->t175 =24s). Between episodes she sprays to re-accumulate 80 landed pellets.
modeTimeline.roundsInterpretation: '3 rounds' = ~3 short reload cycles ~ the observed ~3s episode. Could not cleanly count reloads inside the beam-heavy episodes; mapping is consistent but MEDIUM-LOW confidence. Magazine ~9 (SG standard; ammo counter observed max 008).

fractions.burst_15pellet: overlaid on ~15-40s (2-3 self-bursts); not separable as a clean fraction
fractions.confidence: medium-low (3s sampling can undercount brief episodes; plausible range up to ~25%)
fractions.correctionToPriorEstimate: s4's ~35-40% consolidation is likely TOO HIGH: it ignores that the mid/far third of the fight (~t65-120) is spray-only because consolidation is range-gated.

damageDirection.headline: Consolidation raises damage strongly DURING BURST; roughly neutral-to-slightly-lower OUT of burst on this single-target boss.
damageDirection.reasoning: Out of burst: consolidation trades a ~7-landed-pellet spray shot (~7x24300 ~ 170k, few core) for ONE guaranteed +72% core bullet (~110k). On a single-target boss the pierce adds no extra targets, so per-shot it is comparable-to-lower. DURING BURST the buffs multiply the single guaranteed core into ~1.1-1.55M per shot, dwarfing a buffed spray shot -> large net gain. Net over the fight is positive, dominated by burst-window consolidation.
damageDirection.engineNote: Model consolidation's value as burst-state-dependent, not a flat multiplier. Confidence medium; exact per-shot spray-vs-consolidation totals not fully pinned.

sprayCoreRateByBand.note: Not exhaustively re-counted. Spray-mode red cores (48599/55889) appeared occasionally amid ~6-8 whites at near range and were rare at far/mid. This is CONSISTENT with the established SG baseline on this same boss (Drake: ~0.072 near, ~0 far/mid). A dedicated per-band count excluding consolidation cores was NOT performed.
sprayCoreRateByBand.confidence: low (qualitative; defer to existing coreband-drake-sg.json baseline)

fullBurstWindows.note: She self-charges Burst III. Sustained red vignette seen around t~56 (v57-61) and t~117-127 (v119-131) from the countdown-strip tint; a possible later one ~t158-172. A per-frame red-tint metric conflated FB vignette with red core-hit flashes, so windows are approximate.

confounds: GREEN PIERCE BEAM is near-range VFX, present in BOTH spray and consolidation (proven: v170 shows a 5-number spray cluster WITH a full green beam). It cannot be used to separate modes; it tracks boss proximity.

The green beam's white-hot core defeats pure-white-text popup detectors (beam reads as white), so automated color classification of spray-vs-consolidation is unreliable; classification here is visual.
Popup lingering (~0.5-1s) and overlap bias time-sampling toward spray and prevent exact per-shot pellet counts (esp. the +5 burst -> 15).
Large ~1.1-1.55M 'CORE HIT PIERCE' single values not cleanly separable from burst-boosted consolidation cores vs burst-cast/skill riders.
